summary:
The issue was a port mismatch between the Flask application and the Nginx reverse proxy. The Flask application in `app/server.py` was configured to listen on port `5000`, while the Nginx configuration in `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default` was attempting to proxy requests to port `5001`.

I corrected the `proxy_pass` directive in `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default` to point to `http://127.0.0.1:5000`. After this change, running `./test.sh` confirmed that all tests passed, including both the synthetic health check and the API data retrieval through the proxy.
